DEPT 7/JUDGE MASON/REPORTER:LAURA ESPINOSA/CLERK:G.SHULL. C/C FOR JURY TRIAL. ATNY ARTHUR ANDREAS PRESENT WITH PLTF. ATNYS DAVINA PUJARI AND CATHERINE GILSON FOR DEFT CITY & COUNTY. DEFT LEON CHILTON IS NOT PRESENT. COUNSEL ARGUE MOTIONS IN LIMINE. ROLL CALL OF PROSPECTIVE JURORS AND SWORN AS TO THEIR QUALIFICATIONS. VOIR DIRE BY COURT AND COUNSEL. NEITHER SIDE EXERCISES PEREMPTORY CHALLENGES. 12 JURORS SWORN TO TRY THE CAUSE AND TWO ALTERNATE JURORS SWORN. JURY TRIAL CONTINUED TO 6-24-97 AT 9:00AM FOR COUNSEL AND 9:30AM FOR JURY FOR OPENING ARGUMENT AND COMMENCEMENT OF PLTF'S CASE IN CHIEF.

FURTHER ORAL AND DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE PRESENTED BY BOTH SIDES. JURY TRIAL CONTINUED TO 6-25-97 AT 9:00AM IN DEPT 7. JURORS ARE ORDERED TO RETURN AT 9:30AM.
JURY TRIAL CONTINUED TO JUN-26-1997 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 07 PER DEPARTMENT AT TRIAL

DEPT 7/JUDGE MASON/REPORTER:MITCH LYON/CLERK:G.SHULL. C/C FOR CONTINUED JURY TRIAL. ALL PARTIES AND JURORS ARE PRESENT EXCEPT FOR JUROR #12, JAMEEL SUGHAIR, WHO WAS EXCUSED BY COURT AT THE CLOSE OF AFTERNOON SESSION ON 6-24-97 DUE TO HARDSHIP. COURT REPLACES JUROR #12 WITH REMAINING ALTERNATE JUROR JOHN D. WARNER. PLTF'S CASE CONTINUED. FURTHER DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE PRESENTED BY BOTH SIDES. PLTF RESTS. DEFENSE CASE COMMENCED; DEFENSE RESTS. PLTF COMMENCES REBUTTAL EVIDENCE TO BE CONCLUDED WHEN TRIAL CONTINUES ON 6-26-97 AT 9:30. COUNSEL ORDERED PRESENT AT 9:00AM.
JURY TRIAL CONTINUED TO JUN-27-1997 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 07 PER DEPARTMENT AT TRIAL

DEPT 7/JUDGE MASON/REPORTER:MITCH LYON/CLERK:G.SHULL. JURY TRIAL CONTINUED; ALL PARTIES AND JURORS ARE PRESENT. PLTF PRESENTS FURTHER REBUTTAL EVIDENCE. CLOSING ARGUMENT BY BOTH SIDES. COURT INSTRUCTS JURY. BAILIFF SWORN TO TAKE CHARGE OF JURY AS JURY RETIRES TO DELIBERATE. ADMITTED EXHIBITS AND JURY INSTRUCTIONS SENT TO DELIBERATION ROOM. JURY TRIAL CONTINUED TO 6-27-97 AT 9:30AM FOR FURTHER JURY DELIBERATION.
PER DIEM FEES DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF BALAZS, ARANKA

DEPT 7/JUDGE MASON/REPORTER:DAVE DAVENPORT/CLERK:G.SHULL & J.WEIR. JURY RETURNS TO JURY DELIBERATION ROOM FOR CONTINUED DELIBERATION. ALL JURORS ARE PRESENT; ALL COUNSEL PRESENT. CLERK: J.WEIR: JURY RETURNS WITH VERDICT. CLERK READS VERDICT INTO RECORD. JURY FINDS IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANTS. JURY POLLED BY CLERK: 10 JURORS ANSWER THAT JURY VERDICT IS THEIR PERSONAL VERDICT. JURY THANKED AND EXCUSED. EXHIBITS WITHDRAWN & RETURNED TO RESPECTIVE PARTIES.
